name: throupletea-app
description: A Little Throuple Tea iOS app built with Capacitor.

scripts.update:ios: npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.live:ios: cp capacitor.config.live.json capacitor.config.json && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.bundled:ios: cp capacitor.config.bundled.json capacitor.config.json && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
